<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="WdLmlmQcixKolKTrMWd-"> <mxGraphModel dx="1780" dy="928" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 11
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
 BackgroundColor #EAF4FB
 BorderColor #2E75B6
 HeaderBackgroundColor #1F4E79
 HeaderFontColor White
 FontSize 11
}
skinparam package {
 BackgroundColor #F8FBFE
 BorderColor #2E75B6
 FontColor #1F4E79
 FontStyle bold
}
skinparam ArrowColor #2E75B6
skinparam stereotypeFontSize 10
skinparam linetype ortho
hide circle

title Parallel Web Crawler — Full Class Diagram

' ──────────────────────────────────────────
package \"com.crawler\" {
 class Main {
 + {static} main(args: String[]) : void
 }
}

' ──────────────────────────────────────────
package \"com.crawler.model\" {

 class CrawlerConfig {
 - seedUrl : String
 - maxDepth : int
 - maxPages : int
 - threadCount : int
 - timeoutMs : int
 - politenessDelayMs : long
 - saveToCSV : boolean
 - saveToJSON : boolean
 - saveToSQLite : boolean
 - outputDir : String
 --
 + getSeedUrl() : String
 + getMaxDepth() : int
 + getMaxPages() : int
 + getThreadCount() : int
 + getTimeoutMs() : int
 + getPolitenessDelayMs() : long
 + isSaveToCSV() : boolean
 + isSaveToJSON() : boolean
 + isSaveToSQLite() : boolean
 + getOutputDir() : String
 }

 class \"CrawlerConfig.Builder\" as Builder {
 - seedUrl : String
 - maxDepth : int = 2
 - maxPages : int = 100
 - threadCount : int = 4
 --
 + seedUrl(url: String) : Builder
 + maxDepth(d: int) : Builder
 + maxPages(p: int) : Builder
 + threadCount(t: int) : Builder
 + timeoutMs(ms: int) : Builder
 + politenessDelayMs(ms: long) : Builder
 + saveToCSV(b: boolean) : Builder
 + saveToJSON(b: boolean) : Builder
 + saveToSQLite(b: boolean) : Builder
 + outputDir(dir: String) : Builder
 + build() : CrawlerConfig
 }

 class CrawledPage {
 - url : String
 - title : String
 - description : String
 - links : List<String>
 - statusCode : int
 - crawlTimeMs : long
 - crawledAt : LocalDateTime
 - depth : int
 --
 + CrawledPage(url, title, desc,\n links, statusCode,\n crawlTimeMs, depth)
 + getUrl() : String
 + getTitle() : String
 + getDescription() : String
 + getLinks() : List<String>
 + getStatusCode() : int
 + getCrawlTimeMs() : long
 + getCrawledAt() : LocalDateTime
 + getDepth() : int
 + toString() : String
 }

}

' ──────────────────────────────────────────
package \"com.crawler.core\" {

 class CrawlerEngine {
 - config : CrawlerConfig
 - visitedUrls : Set<String>\n <<ConcurrentHashMap>>
 - queue : BlockingQueue<UrlTask>\n <<LinkedBlockingQueue>>
 - results : List<CrawledPage>\n <<synchronizedList>>
 - pageCount : AtomicInteger
 - stopped : AtomicBoolean
 - stageDiscoveryMs : long
 - stageFetchMs : long
 - stageExtractionMs : long
 - stageStorageMs : long
 - onPageCrawled : Consumer<CrawledPage>
 - onStageComplete : Consumer<String>
 --
 + CrawlerEngine(config: CrawlerConfig)
 + setOnPageCrawled(cb: Consumer) : void
 + setOnStageComplete(cb: Consumer) : void
 + stop() : void
 + start() : List<CrawledPage>
 + getLastBenchmark() : BenchmarkResult
 - runSequential() : void
 - runParallel() : void
 - crawlPageWithRetry(task, attempt) : CrawledPage
 - saveAndNotify(page: CrawledPage) : void
 - isValidUrl(url: String) : boolean
 }

 class \"CrawlerEngine.UrlTask\" as UrlTask <<record>> {
 + url : String
 + depth : int
 }

 class \"CrawlerEngine.BenchmarkResult\" as BenchmarkResult <<record>> {
 + discoveryMs : long
 + fetchMs : long
 + extractionMs : long
 + storageMs : long
 --
 + totalMs() : long
 + toString() : String
 }

}

' ──────────────────────────────────────────
package \"com.crawler.storage\" {

 interface StorageWriter <<interface>> {
 + save(page: CrawledPage) : void
 }

 class CsvStorage {
 - writer : PrintWriter
 - filePath : String
 --
 + CsvStorage(outputDir: String)
 + save(page: CrawledPage) : void\n <<synchronized>>
 - escape(s: String) : String
 + getFilePath() : String
 }

 class JsonStorage {
 - filePath : String
 - gson : Gson
 --
 + JsonStorage(outputDir: String)
 + save(page: CrawledPage) : void\n <<synchronized>>
 + finalize(pages: List) : void
 + getFilePath() : String
 }

 class SqliteStorage {
 - conn : Connection
 - insertPage : PreparedStatement
 - insertLink : PreparedStatement
 --
 + SqliteStorage(outputDir: String)
 + save(page: CrawledPage) : void\n <<synchronized>>
 + close() : void
 }

}

' ──────────────────────────────────────────
package \"com.crawler.gui\" {

 class CrawlerApp {
 + start(stage: Stage) : void
 + {static} main(args: String[]) : void
 }

 class MainController {
 - engine : CrawlerEngine
 - crawlThread : Thread
 - tableData : ObservableList<PageRow>
 - totalPages : AtomicInteger
 - successPages : AtomicInteger
 - errorPages : AtomicInteger
 - totalLinks : AtomicLong
 - seqTotalMs : long
 - parTotalMs : long
 --
 + initialize() : void
 + onStart() : void
 + onStop() : void
 + onClear() : void
 - runCrawl(url, threads, isBenchPar) : void
 - onPageResult(page: CrawledPage) : void
 - onCrawlComplete(error: boolean) : void
 - displaySpeedupResult() : void
 - updateStageLabels(b: BenchmarkResult) : void
 - appendLog(msg: String) : void
 }

 class \"MainController.PageRow\" as PageRow {
 + depth : SimpleIntegerProperty
 + status : SimpleIntegerProperty
 + title : SimpleStringProperty
 + url : SimpleStringProperty
 + links : SimpleIntegerProperty
 + time : SimpleLongProperty
 --
 + PageRow(p: CrawledPage)
 }

}

package \"com.crawler.util\" {
 class ConsoleDisplay {
 + {static} printBanner() : void
 + {static} printConfig(c: CrawlerConfig) : void
 + {static} printPageResult(p: CrawledPage) : void
 + {static} printSummary(results, elapsed, dir) : void
 }
}

' ──────────────────────────────────────────
' Relationships
Builder ..> CrawlerConfig : <<creates>>
CrawlerConfig +-- Builder : <<inner class>>

CrawlerEngine --> CrawlerConfig : uses
CrawlerEngine --> CrawledPage : creates
CrawlerEngine +-- UrlTask : <<inner record>>
CrawlerEngine +-- BenchmarkResult : <<inner record>>
CrawlerEngine --> CsvStorage : uses
CrawlerEngine --> JsonStorage : uses
CrawlerEngine --> SqliteStorage : uses

CsvStorage ..|> StorageWriter
JsonStorage ..|> StorageWriter
SqliteStorage ..|> StorageWriter

MainController --> CrawlerEngine : creates & controls
MainController --> CrawlerConfig : builds
MainController +-- PageRow : <<inner class>>
MainController --> CrawledPage : receives

CrawlerApp --> MainController : loads via FXML
Main --> CrawlerApp : launches
Main --> CrawlerEngine : can use directly
ConsoleDisplay --> CrawledPage : displays
ConsoleDisplay --> CrawlerConfig : displays
